titleStmt.title: SII 37.402: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 402. (A.R. No. B 49 of 1941-42.) Tēḷḷapāḍu, Badvel Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab lying in a field near the tank about 3/4 km to the west of the village.
This is dated Śaka 1472, Sādhāraṇa, Māgha śu. 15, corresponding to 1551 A.D., January 22, Thursday.

It records a grant of land as dasavanda made by Pedda-Vōbuḷnāyiniṅgāru, the son of Mahānāyaṅkāchārya Vonnam Ādināyuḍu, to three persons who repaired the breach in, and rebuilt, the bund of the tank at Tēḷḷapāḍu which was situated in the Kalsapāḍu division of the Sakali-sīma in the Ghaṇḍikōta-rājya which division was given as nāyaṅkara by Nandyāla Timmarāju to the donor.
[Published in Inscriptions of Andhra Pradesh: Cuddapah District, Part II, No. 216.]

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayā
bhyudaya śālivāha
na śakavarṣaṁbulu 1472
Agunēṭi sādhāraṇa saṁvatsa
ra māgha śu 15 lu . śrīmanma
hānāyaṁkācāryulaina
vonnaṁ Ādināyani komā
ruṁḍu pedavōbuḷnāyaniṁ
gāru bōḍireḍḍi cinavōbayya
mūrāreḍḍi surubayya ka
mmana pōtayyaṁgāriki yi
ccina dasavaṁda mānyapu śā
sana kramameṭlannanu śrīmadrā
jādhirājarājaparamēśvara śrī
vīrapratāpa śrī sadāsivarāya
dēva mahārāyalu vijayanaga
ramaṁdu pṛdhivini sakala sā
mrājyaṁ sēyucuṁḍaṁgā
nu Ī siṁhvāsanānaku cellē ghaṁ
ḍikōṭa rājyaṁlōni sakalisīma
lōpalanu naṁdyāla timmarāja
yyadēvamahārājuluṁgāru
māku pāliṁcina māpūrva
mayina nāyaṁkrānaku ce
llē kalcapāṭiki cellē tellapāṭi

polaṁlōni mēḷla
kuṁṭa tegivuṁ
ḍaṁgānu kuṁṭa
kaṭṭiṁcumani
mīku sāgiṁcina
vivaraṁ voḍipi kaṭṭiṁ
ccipai kaṭṭavēśi tū
mu kaṭṭiṁcci rūpucēśē
ṭaṁduku pellettu mānya
ṁ tellapāṭiki Uttaraṁ cēnu
73 muttumu kanemeṭikālvata
vviṁci kuṁṭaku nīḷlu teccēṭaṁ
duku mānyaṁ tellaṁbā
raṁ cēnu khaṁ . 1 Ādurku
nu kha 0 . 4 tommaṁdumu
nyaṁ yistimi kuṁṭavenaka ni
kaṭṭina maḍi nagariki 4 nālgu pāḷlu
ṁḍaṁ 1 vokapāri lekhanunnu
lanu mūṁḍu sthaḷālanun dasavaṁ
stimi Iṁdulaku tappaka pellettu
mānyaṁ kālva mānyalu mī
ryaṁgānu Ācaṁdrārkasthā
kuṁṭanu kālvānu rūpu
mānyalu Anubhaviṁci bra
yavaru tappinānu tama ta
gōvu brāhmalarnu vāraṇā
cina pāpāna pōvuvā
niṁgārikiṁnni Akka maṁ
ṇyaṁgānu sāgiṁcēdi
Digital edition of SII 37.402 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
